title: Easy Baked Spaghetti
description: This easy baked spaghetti recipe is the perfect comfort food for busy weeknights. Creamy Alfredo sauce coats tender spaghetti noodles before being layered with savory ground beef, rich spaghetti sauce, and plenty of melted mozzarella cheese. With just a handful of simple ingredients and about 30 minutes in the oven, you'll have a hearty, cheesy family dinner that's sure to become a favorite. Serve it with garlic bread, a fresh salad, or roasted vegetables for a complete meal everyone will enjoy.
